entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., an important crop in arid and semi-arid areas of India and Africa

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where pearl millet is an important crop

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where pearl millet is an important crop

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand non-biological environmental stresses

entities.name: MICRORNAS
entities.description: Small regulatory RNAs of 20-22 bases that play roles in plant growth, development, and stress responses

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The process of increasing in size or development of a plant

entities.name: PLANT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process by which a plant grows from a seed to a mature organism

entities.name: STRESS RESPONSE
entities.description: The physiological and molecular reactions of a plant to environmental stress

entities.name: SALINITY STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by high salt concentrations in the soil

entities.name: SMALL RNA SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing technique used to identify small RNA molecules like miRNAs

entities.name: CONSERVED MIRNAS
entities.description: miRNAs that are maintained across different species

entities.name: NOVEL MIRNAS
entities.description: Newly identified miRNAs specific to a species or genotype

entities.name: MRNAS
entities.description: Messenger RNAs that serve as targets for miRNA-mediated regulation

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTORS
entities.description: Proteins encoded by mRNAs that regulate the transcription of other genes

entities.name: PATHWAY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A computational method used to identify biological pathways associated with a set of genes or miRNAs

entities.name: AUXIN RESPONSE PATHWAY
entities.description: A biological signaling pathway involved in plant growth and development regulated by auxin

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE REAL-TIME PCR
entities.description: A laboratory technique used to quantify the expression levels of specific RNA sequences

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The specific ability of a plant genotype to survive and grow under high salinity conditions
